title: NNN & Net Lease Investing
subtitle: The MaxLife Development specialty — passive income from credit tenants
description: Triple-net leased properties are the closest thing CRE offers to bonds: long-term, credit-tenant leases with the tenant paying taxes, insurance, and maintenance. This course covers the full NNN playbook — from tenant credit analysis and lease structure to 1031-exchange-ready underwriting — drawing on MaxLife's live deal flow.
outcomes: Understand NNN, NN, and absolute NNN lease structures and who pays what
Analyze tenant credit for investment-grade and non-rated tenants
Underwrite a NNN deal including primary term, options, and rent escalations
Identify the best NNN tenants for Florida markets
Use NNN properties as 1031-exchange destinations for passive income
